description:
You are a wind energy engineer evaluating candidate airfoils for a small wind turbine operating at moderate Reynolds numbers. Generate XFoil viscous analysis polar data in QBlade for the three NACA airfoil coordinate files in /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/ (naca0015.dat, naca2412.dat, and naca4412.dat). The analysis requires a Reynolds number of 1,000,000 and an angle of attack range from -5 to 20 degrees. Export the resulting aerodynamic coefficients (Cl, Cd, etc.) as columns across the analyzed range to the following files:

- /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/polar_naca0015.txt
- /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/polar_naca2412.txt
- /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/polar_naca4412.txt

You are logged in as user 'ga'.
